eventLog: The bar repairs are completed ahead of schedule thanks to player help. The doors are open again.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 6/6.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 5/6.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 4/6.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 3/6.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 2/6.
Hunt helps repair the bar. Repair progress: 1/6.
[CHAIN EVENT — STREET] Boots pound outside. Town guards push toward the bar entrance, demanding to know who started the trouble.
Hunt backs off while the bar tears itself apart. The disturbance spills toward the street.
[EVENT — BAR] The argument explodes. A stool flips, someone swings, and the whole room jolts into chaos.

Hunt starts a bar fight!
Takes 8 damage.
Honor -2.
Chaos +2.
Bartender Rowan has had enough of them.
The bar is forced to close for repairs. It should reopen by Day 2, 18:00 unless players repair it sooner.
[EVENT — VILLAGE] The villagers are already gossiping about the damage at the bar. Apparently no one agrees on who was most to blame.
The bar does not currently need repairs.
[CHAIN EVENT — STREET] Boots pound outside. Town guards push toward the bar entrance, demanding to know who started the trouble.
Hunt backs off while the bar tears itself apart. The disturbance spills toward the street.
[CHAIN EVENT — BAR] The argument explodes. A stool flips, someone swings, and the whole room jolts into chaos.
Hunt hangs back. No one steps in before fists start flying.
[EVENT — BAR] A drunk patron slams his mug down and accuses a traveling merchant of cheating him.
